zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ashby是Alice Curson的女兒，於大約1482年出生在英國奧可福爾。她於1500年與Sir James Clarke在英國英格蘭奧可福爾諾斯 韋斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1576年在英國享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Ashby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Ashby, from Old Norse askr ‘ash’ (or in one instance possibly from the Old Norse personal name Aski) + bȳ ‘farm’.

variants.name: Asby
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so named, or from Asby or Great and Little Asby in Cumbria, all named from Old Norse askr ‘ash tree’ + bȳ ‘farmstead’ (see Ashby ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ashby was born about 1482, in Oxfordshire, England as the daughter of Alice Curson. She married Sir James Clarke in 1500, in North Weston, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1576, in England, at the age of 95, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1576, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ashbyは約1482年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでAlice Cursonの娘として生まれた。1500年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアノース ウエストンでSir James Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1576年にイギリスで95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ashby(은)는 대략 1482년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Alice Curson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 노르스 웨스턴에서 Sir James Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1576년 영국에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Clarke в 1500 г. в местности норт вестон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1576 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
